commands.name: create
commands.description: Create an API Management instance from files

options.name: --configFile
options.description: Config YAML file location

options.name: --appInsightsInstrumentationKey
options.description: AppInsights intrumentationkey

options.name: --appInsightsName
options.description: AppInsights Name

options.name: --namedValueKeys
options.description: Named Values

options.name: --apimNameValue
options.description: Apim Name Value

options.name: --backendUrlConfigFile
options.description: Backend url json file location

options.name: --preferredAPIsForDeployment
options.description:
Create ARM templates for the given APIs
Name(comma separated) else leave this
parameter blank then by default all
api's will be considered

options.name: --parameterizeNamedValuesAndSecrets
options.description:
Allows Creator to parameterize
NamedValues and KeyVault Secrets.
Output ARM Template then can be
deployed to multiple environments

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract an existing API Management instance

options.name: --extractorConfig
options.description: Config file of the extractor

options.name: --sourceApimName
options.description: Source API Management name

options.name: --destinationApimName
options.description: Destination API Management name

options.name: --resourceGroup
options.description: Resource Group name

options.name: --fileFolder
options.description: ARM Template files folder

options.name: --apiName
options.description: Single API name

options.name: --multipleAPIs
options.description: Comma-separated list of API names

options.name: --linkedTemplatesBaseUrl
options.description: Creates a master template with links

options.name: --linkedTemplatesSasToken
options.description: Creates a master template with links

options.name: --linkedTemplatesUrlQueryString
options.description:
Query string appended to linked templates
uris that enables retrieval from private
storage

options.name: --policyXMLBaseUrl
options.description:
Writes policies to local XML files that
require deployment to remote folder

options.name: --policyXMLSasToken
options.description:
String appended to end of the linked
templates uris that enables adding a SAS
token or other query parameters

options.name: --splitAPIs
options.description: Split APIs into multiple templates

options.name: --apiVersionSetName
options.description:
Name of the apiVersionSet you want to
extract

options.name: --includeAllRevisions
options.description:
Includes all revisions for a single api -
use with caution

options.name: --baseFileName
options.description: Specify base name of the template file

options.name: --paramServiceUrl
options.description: Parameterize serviceUrl

options.name: --paramNamedValue
options.description: Parameterize named values

options.name: --paramApiLoggerId
options.description: Specify the loggerId for this api

options.name: --paramLogResourceId
options.description: Specify the resourceId for this logger

options.name: --serviceBaseUrl
options.description:
Specify the the base url for calling api
management

options.name: --notIncludeNamedValue
options.description: Should not include named values template

options.name: --paramNamedValuesKeyVaultSecrets
options.description:
Parameterize named values where value is
retrieved from a Key Vault secret

options.name: --operationBatchSize
options.description: Group the operations into batches of x?

options.name: --paramBackend
options.description:
Parameterize environment specific values
from backend

options.name: --extractGateways
options.description:
Attempt to extract information about
Self-Hosted gateways

options.name: --overrideGroupGuids
options.description:
Override group GUID identification to
system generated

options.name: --overrideProductGuids
options.description: Override product GUID identification to

options.name: --paramApiOauth2Scope
options.description: Parametrize API OAuth2 scope values

options.name: --extractSecrets
options.description:
Extract secrets from the services if
applies

options.name: --extractIdentityProviders
options.description:
Extract identity providers from the
service if applies

options.name: --parametersOutputDirectoryName
options.description:
Parameters output directory name, by
default it is "parameters"

options.name: --excludeBuildInGroups
options.description:
Excludes built-in groups from generated
template if set to "true"

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
